text: Somewhat off-topic but I saw a lot of people moving to BlueSky, decided to read up on the underlying AT protocol and its promise of decentralization and found things I did not like. <https://bsky.app/profile/nilesh.trivedi.link/post/3lanydqvbgk2j|Posted some thoughts>.

attachments.text:
I read up a bit on the AT protocol and I think it has some serious flaws when it comes to achieving decentralization: <https://elk.zone/fosstodon.org/@nilesh/113445987952183384>

The first flaw I noticed is that it makes no attempt to standardize the data formats for user content and leaves it to the apps.
attachments.title: Nilesh Trivedi (@nilesh.trivedi.link)

text:
My first ever proper academic publication!!!!

It's called "Dialogues on Natural Code" — an essay that Dave Ackley and I wrote together

I'd be really grateful if you could give it a read. I promise it's not boring

Also it's a stage play

<https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3689492.3689807|https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3689492.3689807>

attachments.fallback: ACM Conferences: Dialogues on Natural Code | Proceedings of the 2024 ACM SIGPLAN International Symposium on New Ideas, New Paradigms, and Reflections on Programming and Software
